name: Non-Accrual Experience Method

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers in specific service fields (health, law, etc.) or those meeting the gross receipts test, provided no interest or penalties are charged on the debt.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Accrual-basis taxpayers are not required to accrue income that, based on historical experience, they do not expect to collect.
